documentation:
# voice_code Project

This wheel enables text input through voice and clicking, eliminating the need for a keyboard.
## Key Advantages:

Here is a widget for quick correction of approximate words, automatic punctuation, and quick deletion.
The factors that affect the accuracy of letter recognition include pronunciation accuracy, volume level, and word pronunciation intervals. 
If you accurately pronounce the first two sounds of a word, you can expect an accurate result.
You can read softly in the process of collecting similar words.
Now you can use voice and clicking to realize accurate text input.


## Supported Platforms Now

- **Operating Systems**
  - MacOS
  - Windows

- **Python Versions**
  
  - Python 3.10
  - Python 3.11
  - Python 3.12



## Installation

```sh
pip3 install voice_code
```

## Usage
pip3 install voice_code
Download vosk-model-en-us-0.22-lgraph from https://alphacephei.com/vosk/models 
Move vosk-model-en-us-0.22-lgraph into site-packages/voice_code_resource/Easy_Code_res
Run 'voice_code' in terminal
Open your program folder and click (menu bar) -other - create words to short_words and check_worsd.txt to automatically collect words you used.
Click (menu bar) -other - collect similar words... and then read the words, it will automatically create similar words dict and save.
Then you can enjoy inputing by voice now, please watch my videos for more detailed steps if any doubt.

## Commands

    'delete' delete
    'undo' undo in the small input widget.
    'setp' redo in the small input widget.

## Punctuation

    dot: '.'
    separator: ':' ',' ';' '|'
    quote: '"'
    parent: '()' '[]' '{}'
    slash: '/'
    underscore: '_'
    at: '@'
    note: '#'
    percent: '%'
    star: '*'
    plus: '+'
    minus: '-'
    equal: '='
    less: '<'
    greater: '>'
## other
    Keep pressing button 'Letters' when you want to read to input letters.
